allow: Bash(ssh kris@192.168.64.7 "cd /home/kris/netscope && git log -1 --oneline && ls -la netscope 2>/dev/null || echo ''Binary not found''")

Bash(ssh kris@192.168.64.7 "cd /home/kris/netscope && git pull && go build -o netscope ./cmd/netscope && pkill -9 netscope 2>/dev/null; sleep 1 && sudo setcap cap_net_raw=+ep ./netscope && nohup ./netscope > netscope.log 2>&1 & sleep 2 && ps aux | grep ''[n]etscope''")

Bash(timeout 60 ssh krisarmstrong@192.168.64.7 "pkill -9 netscope 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; cd /home/krisarmstrong/netscope && rm -rf configs netscope.log && go build -o netscope ./cmd/netscope && sudo setcap cap_net_raw=+ep ./netscope && nohup ./netscope > netscope.log 2>&1 & sleep 5 && ps aux | grep ''[n]etscope'' && echo ''=== PASSWORD ==='' && grep ''Password:'' netscope.log")

Bash(timeout 120 ssh krisarmstrong@192.168.64.7 "cd /home/krisarmstrong/netscope && go mod tidy && go build -o netscope ./cmd/netscope && pkill -9 netscope 2>/dev/null; sleep 2 && rm -rf configs && sudo setcap cap_net_raw=+ep ./netscope && nohup ./netscope > netscope.log 2>&1 & sleep 5 && ps aux | grep ''[n]etscope'' && echo ''=== PASSWORD ==='' && grep ''Password:'' netscope.log")
Bash(for name in lumina clearpath netinsight)
Bash(for name in linkpulse netpulse wirepulse netprobe wireprobe linkprobe)
